CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), HYPERLINK(Image_URL__c, IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Rectangle (Tall)" ),IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",99,66), IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Rectangle (Wide)"),IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",66,99), IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Square" ), IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",100,100), "")))), IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/NoPhoto.png", "" , 100,100) )
CustomField.label: Image
